summary: Frontend Performance Optimization Test - GameStore with SWR caching. All navigation flows working correctly. Dashboard, FilmPipeline, PvP Arena, MyFilms pages load with data. No console errors detected.

issues: Velion tutorial overlay appears on first login and requires multiple clicks to dismiss (Salta/Avanti buttons). This is expected behavior for new users but can block automated testing.
Daily bonus popup (Riscuoti) appears after login and needs to be dismissed before interacting with dashboard.

critical_code_review_comments: GameStore.jsx: SWR implementation with 30s stale time and 5min max cache time is well designed
GameStore.jsx: Prefetch on hover (usePrefetchOnHover) enables instant navigation
GameStore.jsx: Wave-based prefetching after login (wave1, wave2, wave3) prevents API burst
Dashboard.jsx: useSWR('/dashboard/batch') correctly replaces old cachedGet pattern
PvPArenaPage.jsx: useSWR('/pvp-cinema/arena') and useSWR('/pvp-cinema/stats') working correctly
MyFilms.jsx: useSWR('/films/my') for film list working correctly
FilmPipeline.jsx: useSWR('/film-pipeline/all') and useSWR('/film-pipeline/badges') working correctly
App.js: GameStoreProvider wrapping correctly, useGameStore in TopNavbar for prefetch on hover
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend performance optimization with SWR caching is working. GameStore provides instant navigation by caching API responses. Pages tested: Dashboard, FilmPipeline, PvP Arena, MyFilms. Velion tutorial overlay and daily bonus popup need to be dismissed after login.

frontend.PvP Arena navigation: PASS - Page loads with 5 genre sections
frontend.PvP Arena data: PASS - Films organized by genre (Azione & Thriller, Dramma & Romance, etc.)
frontend.MyFilms navigation: PASS - Page loads with 21 films in grid
